synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-25735 Oracle Linux 9 oracle-common-release bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25735
description:
[1.0-6]
- Retire Oracle Instant Client 23ai repositories [JIRA: OLRM-712]
- Add Oracle Instant Client 26ai repositories [JIRA: OLRM-712]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-25735

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-25735.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
oracle-java-jdk-release-el9-1.0-6.el9.x86_64.rpm
oracle-instantclient-release-26ai-el9-1.0-6.el9.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
oracle-java-jdk-release-el9-1.0-6.el9.aarch64.rpm
oracle-instantclient-release-26ai-el9-1.0-6.el9.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/oracle-common-release-1.0-6.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.0-6]
- Retire Oracle Instant Client 23ai repositories [JIRA: OLRM-712]
- Add Oracle Instant Client 26ai repositories [JIRA: OLRM-712]
